nodes.content:
# Dspy

This map summarizes repository structure and important exploration paths. Start with subsystem nodes and follow evidence-backed links to inspect source files.

## Domain Clusters
- Explore [[docs-docs]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-reliability]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-teleprompt]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-adapters]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-predict]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-utils]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-teleprompt]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-utils]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-adapters]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-predict]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-clients]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-datasets]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-primitives]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-clients]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dspy-dsp]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[github-workflows]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.

## Explorations Needed
- Which subsystems should be prioritized for onboarding documentation?
- Which dependencies are high-risk and need version guardrails?
- Where should integration tests be expanded based on current topology?
